5516.issue: [W5516] type mismatch for "default" at admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_api/api_use: component "checkbox" expects boolean but got string

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/nobl/ioBroker.senec/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
